mlb.headline: Athletics' Clarke out until at least July with hamstring strain
mlb.summary: Athletics outfielder Denzel Clarke suffered a "significant left hamstring strain" and will be out until at least after the All-Star break in July.

nhl.headline: Gretzky marvels at what John Tortorella has done for the Golden Knights
nhl.summary: Wayne Gretzky talks to Pat McAfee about how John Tortorella has helped spark the Golden Knights’ playoff run.

nhl.headline: Carolina Hurricanes fans bring college football vibe to NHL playoffs
nhl.summary: The Hurricanes are fueled by a rowdy, outlandish crowd that brings a college football vibe to the NHL.

nba.headline: Chuck dismissive of physical play on Wemby
nba.summary: Charles Barkley says fans need to stop complaining about Victor Wembanyama being played physically.

nba.headline: Sources: Thunder's Williams day-to-day with hamstring injury
nba.summary: Thunder star wing Jalen Williams will be evaluated day by day, game-to-game with a left hamstring injury, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Thursday.

nba.headline: LeBron James: Lakers were 'out-talented' by Thunder in playoffs
nba.summary: LeBron James says the Lakers were "out-talented" by the Thunder in the playoffs.

tennis.headline: French Open prize money won't change this year, Mauresmo says
tennis.summary: The French Open will not adjust its prize money pool this year despite player complaints about their share of the major's revenue, tournament director Amelie Mauresmo said.

tennis.headline: French Open 2026: How to watch in the UK, schedule, prize money, Brit watch
tennis.summary: Find out all you need to know about the 2026 French Open in the UK, with dates, TV information, prize money and more.

tennis.headline: French Open players plan media protest over prize money share
tennis.summary: Players at the French Open are planning to reduce media appearances ahead of the start of the Grand Slam to complain about their share of the prize money.

tennis.headline: Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of Wimbledon because of wrist injury
tennis.summary: Two-time Wimbledon champion Carlos Alcaraz on Tuesday said he is pulling out of the grass-court Grand Slam event next month because of his lingering wrist injury.
